description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume from Rasasi indulges. Product Details Rasasi Relation is a perfume spray for women which comes an elegant and stylish glass flask with a golden coloured top Size 50 ml
